description: Gravity UI Stylelint config, following our styleguide.
readme:
# @gravity-ui/stylelint-config

Stylelint configuration for Gravity UI projects.

## Requirements

- Node.js >= 20.x
- Stylelint 16.18.0
- PostCSS 8.x

## Install

```
npm install --save-dev stylelint postcss @gravity-ui/stylelint-config
```

## Usage

Add `.stylelintrc` file in the project root with the following content:

```json
{
  "extends": "@gravity-ui/stylelint-config"
}
```

description: Optional Prettier-compatible Stylelint sub-config for Gravity UI projects. Add this alongside the base config when using Prettier to enable stylelint-prettier rules that enforce Prettier formatting via Stylelint.
readme:
# @gravity-ui/stylelint-config/prettier

Optional sub-config for projects using Prettier. Extend alongside the base config to enable `stylelint-prettier/recommended` rules that run Prettier as a Stylelint rule.

## Usage

Add `.stylelintrc` file in the project root with the following content:

```json
{
  "extends": ["@gravity-ui/stylelint-config", "@gravity-ui/stylelint-config/prettier"]
}
```

description: Optional CSS property ordering Stylelint sub-config for Gravity UI projects. Add this alongside the base config to enforce a strict ordering of CSS properties using stylelint-order.
readme:
# @gravity-ui/stylelint-config/order

Optional sub-config that enforces a defined order of CSS properties via the `stylelint-order` plugin. Extend alongside the base config to enable property ordering rules.

## Usage

Add `.stylelintrc` file in the project root with the following content:

```json
{
  "extends": ["@gravity-ui/stylelint-config", "@gravity-ui/stylelint-config/order"]
}
```
